title: Super Optimized
body:
![](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/ta3LzPyq/images/6794901d1428c6d8e8a8a0487ee1c3985cf522d1.png)

### Performance
Usually faster than OptiFine thanks to modern performance mods such as Sodium, Lithium and more!

### OptiFine parity
Supports almost all OptiFine features, including shaders, connected textures and zoom.

### Works everywhere
It works on any world or server.

### Built on Fabric
Compared to Forge, Fabric is lightweight, updates and loads fast, and still has great mod support.
